name: stackra/subscription
purpose: Tenant subscription lifecycle — wraps laravel/cashier for payment-provider-agnostic billing (Stripe + Paddle) with 7-year audit-trail retention.
capabilities: Plan aggregate — per-Application plan catalogue with default_entitlements
Subscription aggregate mixing Cashier's Billable trait onto Tenant
Trials, grace periods beyond provider default
Cashier webhook ingestion translated to internal events
when_to_use: A tenant subscribes to a plan and needs billing lifecycle, trial handling, and audit-material transition events.
when_not_to_use: For entitlement enforcement and metered usage, use stackra/entitlements — subscription owns money, entitlements owns quotas.
